privileged_info_summary: Task involves consolidating two synthetic complaint cases created dynamically at runtime via ArkCase REST API. Master case title is 'Construction noise violation at 7am - Master Record'. Duplicate case title is 'Noise Complaint - Jackhammering' (not 'Early morning jackhammering on 4th Street' as metadata claims). The key phrase 'jackhammering' appears in both the duplicate case title and its description. The required_status 'CLOSED' is verified: the task requires closing the duplicate case and the verifier checks for CLOSE status substring. Data is fully synthetic with runtime-generated case IDs.
